OUTLINES:

Visualize Hi-C contact maps of ChrX in HCC patient polyploid samples

# Load GENOVA package
library(GENOVA)

# Load Hi-C contact matrices for HCC patient with different ploidy levels
p13_2n <- load_contacts(
signal_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/Hi-C/polyploid/250508_P13_N3_N7_20M/P13_2n/hicpro-output/hic_results/matrix/P13_2n/iced/500000/P13_2n_500000_iced.matrix',
indices_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/Hi-C/polyploid/250508_P13_N3_N7_20M/P13_2n/hicpro-output/hic_results/matrix/P13_2n/raw/500000/P13_2n_500000_abs.bed',
sample_name = "p13_2n")
## Reading data...
p13_4n <- load_contacts(
signal_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/Hi-C/polyploid/250508_P13_N3_N7_20M/P13_4n/hicpro-output/hic_results/matrix/P13_4n/iced/500000/P13_4n_500000_iced.matrix',
indices_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/Hi-C/polyploid/250508_P13_N3_N7_20M/P13_4n/hicpro-output/hic_results/matrix/P13_4n/raw/500000/P13_4n_500000_abs.bed',
sample_name = "p13_4n")
## Reading data...
p13_8n <- load_contacts(
signal_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/Hi-C/polyploid/250508_P13_N3_N7_20M/P13_8n/hicpro-output/hic_results/matrix/P13_8n/iced/500000/P13_8n_500000_iced.matrix',
indices_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/Hi-C/polyploid/250508_P13_N3_N7_20M/P13_8n/hicpro-output/hic_results/matrix/P13_8n/raw/500000/P13_8n_500000_abs.bed',
sample_name = "p13_8n")
## Reading data...
# =========================
# Plot individual Hi-C contact maps
# =========================

# 4n vs 2n P13 (HCC)
print("4n vs 2n P13 (HCC)")
## [1] "4n vs 2n P13 (HCC)"
hic_matrixplot(exp1 = p13_4n,
              exp2 = p13_2n,
              coplot = 'diff',
              chrom = 'chrX',
              start = 0,
              end = 155270560)
## No colour limits were given: using 99% percentile: 1171.

# 8n vs 2n P13 (HCC)
print("8n vs 2n P13 (HCC)")
## [1] "8n vs 2n P13 (HCC)"
hic_matrixplot(exp1 = p13_8n,
              exp2 = p13_2n,
              coplot = 'diff',
              chrom = 'chrX',
              start = 0,
              end = 155270560, # upper limit of contacts
              cut.off = 1000)

# 8n vs 4n P13 (HCC)
print("8n vs 4n P13 (HCC)")
## [1] "8n vs 4n P13 (HCC)"
hic_matrixplot(exp1 = p13_8n,
              exp2 = p13_4n,
              coplot = 'diff',
              chrom = 'chrX',
              start = 0,
              end = 155270560, # upper limit of contacts
              cut.off = 1000)
